scope.summary: The R2 rig adds a raw-wire tool-surface sweep that installs oraclemcp from HEAD and invokes every advertised tool across synthetic read-only, protected, proxy-auth, pooled, and DRCP profiles.
out_of_scope: Browser/inspector reachability; R1/R3 own external client and browser lanes.
Field, live-OCI, customer, or production wallet/profile material.
Changing server dispatch behavior or the pinned rust-oracledb driver.

entry_points.name: bash scripts/rig/tool_surface_sweep.sh --dry-run --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The dry run scheduled the installed-artifact and raw-wire sweep stages without running cargo or touching Oracle.

entry_points.name: bash -n scripts/rig/tool_surface_sweep.sh && PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 python3 -m py_compile scripts/rig/tool_surface_sweep.py
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The shell entrypoint parses and the independent Python raw JSON-RPC client compiles without emitting tracked files.

entry_points.name: env -u CARGO_TARGET_DIR scripts/swarm_discipline.sh bounded-run --timeout 900 -- bash scripts/rig/tool_surface_sweep.sh --log
entry_points.trace: Passed on 2026-07-22. The rig installed oraclemcp from git-archive source 9e468878 into target/e2e/r2-tool-surface-8w6sbbk_/prefix/bin/oraclemcp, then drove that installed binary over line-delimited JSON-RPC stdio with no server-side helpers. Summary artifact: target/e2e/r2-tool-surface-8w6sbbk_/summary.json.

entry_points.name: R2 profile matrix wire counts
entry_points.trace: The running server reported read_only/protected/proxy_auth surfaces at 43 wire tools each (26 oracle_* registry names, 16 aliases, plus oracle_capabilities). The pooled and DRCP profiles elevated through oracle_set_session_level preview -> confirmation-token apply to ADMIN, then swept the full 60-tool wire surface: 34 canonical registry tools, 25 compatibility aliases, plus oracle_capabilities.

entry_points.name: R2 three wire-only assertions
entry_points.trace: For every swept tools/call response, the raw client asserted a well-formed JSON-RPC/MCP envelope with known error classes, a serialized response byte budget of at most 1048576 bytes, and refusal grammar uniformity. The guard probe category was UNPROVEN_SIDE_EFFECT consistently across all five postures.

limitations: The matrix uses the local synthetic Free23/D9 rig fixtures only; no live OCI, customer, production, or field identifier is used.
The read_only, protected, and proxy_auth postures intentionally remain at READ_ONLY and therefore sweep their runtime-visible 43-tool surface, not the ADMIN-only write tools.
The pooled and DRCP postures prove the full registry count only after the real preview -> confirmation-token -> apply session elevation gate succeeds.
The full workspace gate was not run because this shared checkout has unrelated in-flight panes.
